data.title: The "100% Win Rate Whale" has opened over $100 million in long positions in BTC and ETH.
data.description: Hypurrscan data shows that the "whale with a 100% win rate since October 11" has now opened over $100 million in BTC and ETH long positions, including: 4x BTC long positions, with a position value of $88.12 million and an opening price of $109,229.6; 5x ETH long positions, with a position value of $17.27 million and an opening price of $3,873.

data.title: Grayscale deposits 525 BTC and 21,030 ETH to Coinbase Prime
data.description: According to Lookonchain, Grayscale deposited 525 BTC (worth $57.22 million) and 21,030 ETH (worth $80.84 million) into Coinbase Prime three hours ago. An hour ago, BlackRock withdrew 681 BTC (worth $74.72 million) and 6,000 ETH (worth $22.91 million) from Coinbase Prime.

data.title: A whale spent $3 million USDC to buy 5.116 MET
data.description: According to Onchain Lens, a whale spent $3 million in USDC to buy 5.116 MET in the past few hours. The whale still holds $4.45 million in USDC.

data.title: Richard Heart's associated address transferred another 10,990 ETH
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, the Richard Heart-linked address (0x463...c4F21) transferred 10,990 ETH (worth approximately $42.62 million) to a new address (0xafa...6C0d5). The receiving address has not yet seen any transfers or sales.

data.title: SpaceX Transfers Significant Bitcoin Holdings Again
data.description: According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, SpaceX has transferred 1,215 Bitcoin, valued at $133 million, just three days after a previous transfer. The earlier transaction involved Bitcoin worth $268 million, which remains inactive, leaving the purpose of these transfers unclear.

data.title: Bybit has launched USD1 on the Aptos network, supporting zero-fee deposits and withdrawals
data.description: Bybit has listed USD1, issued by World Liberty Finance on the Aptos network. Users can deposit and withdraw USD1 on Bybit through the Aptos network with zero gas fees. Participating users also have a chance to win USD1 in a lucky draw worth $90,000. Aptos' high performance, low cost, and security provide an efficient clearing and transfer channel for stablecoin assets. Major exchanges, including Bybit and Crypto.com, already support deposits and withdrawals of major stablecoins like USDT and USDC on Aptos, with extremely low or near-zero fees, significantly reducing the cost of stablecoin cross-platform transactions.

data.title: Tether Eyes $15 Billion in 2025 Profits as IPO Buzz Heats Up
data.description:
Tether CEO Paolo Ardoino recently claimed that his company will make $15 billion in profit this year. He added that it has a 99% profit margin, which would be astronomically successful. Of course, we should interpret these comments in light of a rumored impending IPO. Ardoino also stated that its purported $500 billion valuation would be “very cheap,” and described turning away investors
source: https://beincrypto.com/tether-profit-15-billion-ipo-rumors/

data.title: U.S. Government Shutdown Likely to Last Past November 16 — Three Reasons Why
data.description:
The recent analysis indicates that the impending U.S. government shutdown is likely to extend beyond November 16, and there are three key reasons that contribute to this forecast. 

Firstly, ongoing political disagreements between lawmakers regarding budget allocations and funding priorities have created a significant impasse, making it challenging to reach a consensus. 

Secondly, the complexities surrounding various policy issues that remain unresolved are contributing to delays in negotiations, further prolonging the shutdown.

Lastly, the looming specter of partisan politics and the potential for strategic maneuvering in the lead-up to upcoming elections may also play a role in sustaining the shutdown longer than initially anticipated. 

In light of these factors, it appears increasingly probable that the government will remain closed beyond the middle of November.
source: https://blocknews.com/u-s-government-shutdown-likely-to-last-past-november-16-three-reasons-why/

data.title: Coinbase Prime Adds Custody Support for APR, BNB, and weETH

UTC on October 24, expanding withdrawal ceiling across all VIP tiers.   The Dubai exchange platform aims to improve capital efficiency, reflecting its focus on […]

data.title: India’s energy security at risk as Reliance cuts back on Russian oil
data.description:
India’s entire energy equation has been changed forever. Reliance Industries, the country’s biggest private refiner, is quietly pulling away from Russian oil purchases, a direct fallout from new sanctions imposed by the United States on Rosneft and Lukoil. Just as Russia became one of India’s most critical oil suppliers, Donald Trump’s administration is turning the […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/reliance-india-energy-security-at-risk/

data.title: Bitcoin News: Expert Notes Top 4 Reasons Why Bitcoin Has Not Reached Cycle Top
data.description:
Key Insights: The latest Bitcoin news documents the top four reasons why BTC has not yet reached its cycle peak as per an analysis by top analyst Rekt Fencer. According to him, Bitcoin is down by a small margin from its all-time high which is barely sufficient reason to signal a bear market.
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/10/24/bitcoin-news-expert-notes-top-4-reasons-why-bitcoin-has-not-reached-cycle-top/
